creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
An updated port -- tin 1.3unoff.  This superseeds the existing
	port of Tin v1.22.  1.3unoff is based on the 1.3beta that is over
	a year old, and as stable (as least for me) as 1.22.  Many features
	have been added like MIME and PGP support.

	Portball can be found as:
	ftp.cdrom.com:/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/tin-portball.tgz

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
